text: Seeker role only. During conflicts at this province, each player cannot spend fate from his or her fate pool.
name: Blood of Onnotangu

text: Keeper role only. Reaction: After this province is revealed – gain 1 fate for each attacking character.
name: Tears of Amaterasu

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as a defender – resolve the ring effect of that conflict as if you were the attacking player. (Max 1 per conflict)
name: Staunch Hida

text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: Give an opponent 1 fate. Choose an attachment on a character that player controls – take control of that attachment and attach it to an eligible character you control, if able. Otherwise, discard it.
name: Karada District

text: Action: During a conflict – move this character home.
flavorText: "I regret that I must decline your gracious invitation."
name: Doji Representative

text: Courtesy. No Poison attachments. Reaction: After this character enters play, choose an unbroken province – turn that province facedown.
flavorText: "One cannot send the mountains to the Emperor, but one can send an artist."
name: Kitsuki Yaruma

text: Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-military] conflict – draw 1 card.
flavorText: "If you are fighting only the present battle, you have already lost the war." - Kitsu Motso
name: Gifted Tactician

text:
Limit 1 per deck.
[conflict-political] conflicts cannot be declared against this holding's province.
name: Hito District

text:
Immune to opponent's ring effects.
While this character is attacking, the contested ring gains the [element-void] element. If this character wins the conflict as an attacker, instead of choosing an element to resolve, resolve each of that ring's effects.
name: Isawa Kaede

text: While this character is attacking, each other character that has 1 or more fate on it does not count its skill toward the resolution of this conflict.
flavorText: "It is our duty to temper the law with compassion."
name: Swift Magistrate

text: Action: Sacrifice this holding, select one – each player gains 2 fate or each player gains 2 honor. Refill this province faceup.
flavorText: "After a week in the saddle, it felt like the Imperial Palace." - Shinjo Yasamura
name: Windswept Yurt

text: Attached character gains the [clan-crane] clan symbol and the Duelist trait.
flavorText:
In the name of Her Elegance, Lady Doji Hotaru,
Trusted Left Hand of the Emperor,
Beautiful Mistriss of the Arts,
Skillfull Daimyō of the Doji, and
Indomitable Champion of the Crane Clan
name: Seal of the Crane

text: Keeper role only. Action: During a conflict, if you control a participating Courtier character – until the end of the conflict, the attacked province gets +X strength. X is equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand.
name: Disdainful Remark

text: Action: Bow this attachment. Choose an unclaimed ring – move 1 fate from the chosen ring to another unclaimed ring.
flavorText:
"Beauty? Enlightenment? A tragic waste of jade?
What do you see?" - Kitsuku Yaruma
name: Jade Masterpiece

text: Seeker role only. Reaction: After you lose a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a Bushi character you control – put a Weapon attachment with printed cost 3 or lower into play from your hand or conflict discard pile, attached to that character.
name: Time for War

text: Play only if you control a Shugenja character. Interrupt: When 1 or more fate would be removed from attached character – instead, move that fate to your fate pool.
name: Embrace the Void

text: Reaction: After you play this character – look at an opponent's hand.
flavorText:
Samurai seld notice peasants.
Peasants always notice samurai.
name: Meek Informant

text: Action: During a conflict, choose any number of attacking Shinobi characters you control – move each chosen character home.
name: Smoke and Mirrors

text: Reaction: After this character enters play – place 1 fate from an opponent's fate pool on it.
flavorText: "Goblins? Impossible. Goblins have never been spotted this far from the Wall."
name: Goblin Sneak

text: Attach to a character you control. Interrupt: When the effects of a card ability that targets attached character would initiate, sacrifice this attachment – cancel those effects.
name: Finger of Jade
